mapper.select: SELECT chunk.id AS chunk_id, chunk.document_id, chunk.chunk_index, document.file_name, chunk.chunk_text, 1 - (embedding.embedding <=> CAST(#{embedding} AS vector)) AS score FROM chunk_embeddings AS embedding JOIN document_chunks AS chunk ON chunk.id = embedding.chunk_id AND chunk.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} JOIN documents AS document ON document.id = embedding.document_id AND document.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} WHERE embedding.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND chunk.status = 'READY' AND chunk.deleted = FALSE AND document.status = 'READY' ORDER BY embedding.embedding <=> CAST(#{embedding} AS vector) LIMIT #{limit}
